docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY FEDEROFF, THOMAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FEDEROFF, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCE, MARIVIC $2,647.19 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,647.19, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT A RATE OF $250.00 PER MONTH, STARTING JULY 1, 2009 UNTIL DECEMBER 1, 2009. THEREAFTER, DEFENDANT WILL PAY $84.00 PER MONTH UNTIL THE REMAINING BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
